/usr/bin/ar qc libhft_exchange.a CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/exchange_base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/exchange_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/binance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/bybit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/okx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/kraken.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/coinbase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/kucoin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/gateio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/bitfinex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/deribit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_exchange.dir/src/exchange/htx.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libhft_exchange.a
